Index

A C D E F G H I L M O P Q R S T U V X Y 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

S

saveCustomer(Customer) - Static method in class simulation.Database
Saves a customer to the database.
securityTime - Variable in class simulation.Customer
Customer class has a securityTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the security check, a cloakroomTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the cloakroom and a merchTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the merch store.
ServicePoint - Class in simulation
Service point entity with a defined amount of employees.
ServicePoint(int) - Constructor for class simulation.ServicePoint
Creates a service point with the given number of employees.
setPosition() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Sets a Customer-instance's x-position and y-position based on the x-value and y-value.
setQueuePosition(int) - Method in class simulation.Customer
Sets a Customer-instance's queuePosition-value based on the given parameter.
setTime(double) - Method in class simulation.Clock
 
SimController - Class in controller
Handle's the launching of the simGUI view.
SimController() - Constructor for class controller.SimController
 
simDuration - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Variable that records the duration of the simulation.
simDurationField - Variable in class controller.MenuController
TextField that takes the value for the duration of the simulation.
simGC - Static variable in class view.SimGUI
Adds a GraphicsContext class to the code.
SimGUI - Class in view
Handles the simulation GUI.
SimGUI() - Constructor for class view.SimGUI
 
simStartButton - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Button that starts the simulation.
simulaationKesto - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Simulation duration in seconds, used to stop the simulation when the time is over.
simulation - package simulation
 
simulationSpeed - Static variable in class simulation.Controller
Simulation speed in milliseconds, used to slow down the simulation so that it can be observed.
size() - Method in class simulation.EventList
Returns the number of events in the EventList.
start(Stage) - Method in class view.MenuGUI
 
start(Stage) - Method in class view.SimGUI
 
START_ENTER_CONCERT_HALL - Enum constant in enum class simulation.EventType
START_ENTER_CONCERT_HALL: This event type indicates that a customer is starting to enter the concert hall.
START_GA_CLOAKROOM - Enum constant in enum class simulation.EventType
START_GA_CLOAKROOM: This event type indicates that a GA customer is starting to use the cloakroom service.
START_GA_SECURITY - Enum constant in enum class simulation.EventType
START_GA_SECURITY: This event type indicates that a GA customer is starting the GA security check.
START_MERCH - Enum constant in enum class simulation.EventType
START_MERCH: This event type indicates that a customer is starting to purchase merchandise.
START_VIP_CLOAKROOM - Enum constant in enum class simulation.EventType
START_VIP_CLOAKROOM: This event type indicates that a VIP customer is starting to use the cloakroom service.
START_VIP_SECURITY - Enum constant in enum class simulation.EventType
START_VIP_SECURITY: This event type indicates that a VIP customer is starting the VIP security check.
submit(ActionEvent) - Method in class controller.MenuController
Submits the values given in the MenuGUI to the simulation.
